'''zhadava''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:huangite|huangite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-d-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:huangite|huangite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zhadava
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhædævæth|zhædævæth]] || [[word:zhædævæj|zhædævæj]] || [[word:zhædævæsh|zhædævæsh]] || [[word:zhædævæ|zhædævæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhadadavath|zhadadavath]] || [[word:zhadadavaj|zhadadavaj]] || [[word:zhadadavash|zhadadavash]] || [[word:zhadadava|zhadadava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhadavath|zhadavath]] || [[word:zhadavaj|zhadavaj]] || [[word:zhadavash|zhadavash]] || [[word:zhadava|zhadava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhadafvath|zhadafvath]] || [[word:zhadafvaj|zhadafvaj]] || [[word:zhadafvash|zhadafvash]] || [[word:zhadafvaf|zhadafvaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhadavatha|zhadavatha]] || [[word:zhadavaja|zhadavaja]] || [[word:zhadavasha|zhadavasha]] || [[word:zhadavaka|zhadavaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhadavath|zhadavath]] || [[word:zhadavaj|zhadavaj]] || [[word:zhadavash|zhadavash]] || [[word:zhadava|zhadava]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhadavathal|zhadavathal]] || [[word:zhadavajal|zhadavajal]] || [[word:zhadavashal|zhadavashal]] || [[word:zhadavakal|zhadavakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhadavathatha|zhadavathatha]] || [[word:zhadavajaja|zhadavajaja]] || [[word:zhadavashasha|zhadavashasha]] || [[word:zhadavaka|zhadavaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhadavathan|zhadavathan]] || [[word:zhadavajan|zhadavajan]] || [[word:zhadavashan|zhadavashan]] || [[word:zhadavakan|zhadavakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhadavathaoro|zhadavathaoro]] || [[word:zhadavajaoro|zhadavajaoro]] || [[word:zhadavashaoro|zhadavashaoro]] || [[word:zhadavakaoro|zhadavakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
